title: Xtra Spicy Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A low-calorie, cultured dish featuring white wine and a cheese-pull, perfect for a date night, this Jamaican recipe is a must-try for any occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together white wine, scotch bonnet peppers, allspice, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
While the chicken is cooking, knead the feta cheese to make it pliable.
Once the chicken is cooked, brush with additional white wine and top with the kneaded feta cheese.
Return the skewers to the grill for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and slightly browned.
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve immediately.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
